purpose: Force diversity across LLM-authored held-out test sets.

chatgpt.timeline_bias: spread events across Days 1, 3, 5, and 7 with several low-irradiance or transition-time BESS cases

claude.timeline_bias: spread events across Days 1, 2, 4, and 6 with morning/midday PV cases
must_include: at least 2 stale/delayed measurement context scenarios

gemini.timeline_bias: spread events across Days 2, 3, 5, and 7 with PCC voltage/power stress cases
must_include: at least 3 PCC voltage/current/power observable scenarios
at least 2 physical_only class scenarios using allowed families

grok.timeline_bias: spread events across Days 1, 4, 6, and 7 with oscillatory and delayed-response cases

must_include: no more than 4 scenarios from any one family

compatibility_note: These assignments target the final single-site dataset only. Do not use old IEEE123 multi-DER asset names. Scenario families are intentionally held-out test families and do not need to match training families.
